purpose: Atomic webpage UI functions optimized for AI retrieval and composition.

rag_usage.selection_rule: Always select core_runtime. Select the smallest content blocks that satisfy the request, then recursively include dependencies.
rag_usage.call_contract: Call assemble_site(shared_context, selected_block_names). Block order does not control layout; core_runtime assembles named output slots.

blocks.name: core_runtime
blocks.summary: Creates the HTML shell, shared CSS, shared JavaScript, responsive layout, and all component containers.
blocks.use_when: Always.

blocks.name: gallery_main_image
blocks.summary: Creates the large currently selected product image or its placeholder.
blocks.use_when: A page needs a primary product image, even without thumbnails.

blocks.name: gallery_thumbnails
blocks.summary: Creates clickable thumbnail navigation that changes the main gallery image.
blocks.use_when: A gallery has multiple images the user should switch between.

blocks.name: gallery_caption
blocks.summary: Creates the text caption beneath the gallery and updates it when a thumbnail is selected.
blocks.use_when: Gallery images need explanatory captions.

blocks.name: product_title
blocks.summary: Creates only the primary H1 product title.
blocks.use_when: A visible product/page title is needed.

blocks.name: product_price
blocks.summary: Creates only the visible base product price.
blocks.use_when: A price should be displayed.

blocks.name: product_description
blocks.summary: Creates only the short plain-text product description.
blocks.use_when: Introductory product copy is needed.

blocks.name: primary_action
blocks.summary: Creates one primary button or link.
blocks.use_when: A main Add to Cart, Buy, Learn More, or similar action is needed.

inputs.name: primary_cta_url
inputs.description: A URL creates a link; empty creates a button.

blocks.name: information_heading
blocks.summary: Creates only the heading above the product-information area.
blocks.use_when: The details/tabs area needs a visible heading.

blocks.name: information_tab_navigation
blocks.summary: Creates only the clickable tab buttons.
blocks.use_when: Users need controls for switching information panels.

blocks.name: information_tab_panels
blocks.summary: Creates only the content panels addressed by tab navigation.
blocks.use_when: Tabbed product content should be rendered.

blocks.name: addon_heading
blocks.summary: Creates only the heading above an add-on configurator.
blocks.use_when: An add-on/options area needs a title.

blocks.name: addon_catalog
blocks.summary: Creates add-on categories, item cards, images, variant labels, prices, and quantity controls.
blocks.use_when: Users need to browse or choose accessories, add-ons, or bundle items.

blocks.name: addon_summary_heading
blocks.summary: Creates only the heading above selected add-ons.
blocks.use_when: The add-on summary needs a title.

blocks.name: addon_selection_lines
blocks.summary: Creates the live list where selected add-on names, quantities, and line prices appear.
blocks.use_when: Selected add-ons should be itemized.

blocks.name: addon_total
blocks.summary: Creates only the live calculated total row.
blocks.use_when: The configurator should display a total.

blocks.name: addon_submit_action
blocks.summary: Creates the final add-selected button and its status-message region.
blocks.use_when: Users need to submit or hand off configured selections.

blocks.name: product_metafields_heading
blocks.summary: Creates only the heading above product-level metadata.
blocks.use_when: Product attributes need a section title.

blocks.name: product_metafields_list
blocks.summary: Creates only the key/value definition list of product-level metadata.
blocks.use_when: Stable attributes such as material, dimensions, or warranty should be shown.

blocks.name: variant_metafields_heading
blocks.summary: Creates only the heading above variant-specific metadata.
blocks.use_when: Variant attributes need a section title.

blocks.name: variant_selector
blocks.summary: Creates only the dropdown used to select a variant metadata panel.
blocks.use_when: Users should switch between SKU, size, color, or model metadata.

blocks.name: variant_metafields_panels
blocks.summary: Creates the separate key/value metadata panel for every variant.
blocks.use_when: Variant-specific attributes should be rendered.
